  Log:
  [New port] chinese/fqterm: a Chinese BBS client
  
          FQterm is a BBS client based on Qt4 libraries, supports
          Simplified and Traditional Chinese BBSs, and with full
          SSH2 support.
  
  PR:             ports/124267
  Submitted by:   "Denise H. G." <darcsis@gmail.com>
